entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The host crop associated with the bud necrosis tospovirus

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A tospovirus that causes bud necrosis in peanuts

entities.name: M RNA
entities.description: The M RNA segment of the peanut bud necrosis tospovirus, 4801 nucleotides in length

entities.name: OPEN READING FRAMES
entities.description: The two ORFs present in the M RNA in an ambisense organization

entities.name: AMBISENSE ORGANIZATION
entities.description: The genomic arrangement of the ORFs in the M RNA

entities.name: TERMINAL INVERTED REPEATS
entities.description: Structural repeats at the ends of the M RNA

entities.name: 3 PRIME LARGE ORF
entities.description: The larger ORF of 3363 nucleotides in the virus-complementary strand

entities.name: GLYCOPROTEIN PRECURSOR
entities.description: A 127.2 kDa protein encoded by the 3 prime large ORF

entities.name: G1 GLYCOPROTEIN
entities.description: A glycoprotein derived from the glycoprotein precursor

entities.name: G2 GLYCOPROTEIN
entities.description: A glycoprotein derived from the glycoprotein precursor

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A serogroup I tospovirus used for sequence comparison

entities.name: IMPATIENS NECROTIC SPOT TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A serogroup III tospovirus used for sequence comparison

entities.name: BUNYAVIRUS
entities.description: A genus of viruses used for sequence comparison

entities.name: 5 PRIME SMALL ORF
entities.description: The smaller ORF of 924 nucleotides in the virus-sense strand

entities.name: NON-STRUCTURAL NSM PROTEIN
entities.description: A 34.2 kDa protein encoded by the 5 prime small ORF

entities.name: DEFECTIVE RNA MOLECULES
entities.description: RNA molecules derived from the genomic M RNA detected during passage

entities.name: SAP INOCULATIONS
entities.description: The method used for continuous passage of the virus
